data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet for a fantasy RPG enemy, laid out as exactly a 2x2 grid with 4 equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. Solid flat chroma-key background only: #FF00FF magenta, no texture, no gradients, no floor, no shadow, no borders, no visible grid lines.

Subject: normal style melee enemy for Samsara Ascension, a corrupted xianxia raider. Dark red and iron armor plates, ragged black hair, compact heavy blade or claw weapon held close, angular hostile silhouette, clean HD hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG sprite, readable at small size, not cute, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art.

View/framing: full body visible, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, same body height and same pixel scale in every frame, subject fills about 58 to 66 percent of each cell with generous magenta margin. Stable bottom/feet anchor line when grounded. Ensure the entire subject and all accessories fit fully inside each cell: weapon, hair, sleeves, armor edges, any tiny attached cloth or aura must not cross cell boundaries.

Animation: walk cycle with real body pose changes, not just scaling, camera movement, glow changes, or sliding. The four frames must be distinct and loop as walking:
1) top-left: first stride, front limb or leading side moves forward, body leans in travel direction.
2) top-right: passing step, body rises, rear limb or trailing side catches up, cloth or petals trail backward.
3) bottom-left: opposite stride, other limb or side moves forward, weight clearly shifts.
4) bottom-right: passing step returning toward neutral, body lowers slightly; loop reads as movement.

Consistency: preserve the exact same identity, silhouette family, palette, face/eyes or core face, costume/armor marks, weapon or focus, and material language in every cell; only pose, compact clothing motion, limbs, hair, petals, weapon angle, and small attached aura may change.

Forbidden: text, labels, numbers, arrows, UI, watermark, cropped body parts, inconsistent scale, redesigned subject, alternate forms, photorealism, 3D render, pixel art, detached projectile, impact burst, large slash arc, long trail, dust cloud.
